positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a small fox and an owl nestled in a glowing, bioluminescent forest. Style should be detailed watercolor and colored pencil, highly atmospheric, with soft lighting and deep emerald and sapphire tones. Cinematic, storybook art, concept art, trending on ArtStation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, poorly drawn, oversaturated, noisy
